tasks.label: compose: up-min (Phase 1 walking skeleton)

tasks.label: compose: down-min
tasks.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f compose/00-network.yml -f compose/10-state.yml -f compose/20-platform.yml -f compose/30-data.yml -f compose/50-app.yml down

tasks.label: compose: ps
tasks.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f compose/00-network.yml -f compose/10-state.yml -f compose/20-platform.yml -f compose/30-data.yml -f compose/50-app.yml ps
